outcome.attempt_disposition: aborted after cache prime and before measured arms
findings: A 100-step accumulation-4 run executes only 400 backward batches, so log_freq=1000 would emit no watch histogram.
Sequence length 64 changes the positional-encoding buffer and work relative to Attempt 2, contrary to the predeclaration.
Streaming Docker stats rows lacked timestamps, so count coverage could not prove temporal coverage.
